description: Coder Workflow hooks — orchestrate workflow at session start, ensure task tracking on Stop, and remind about bug tracking after file changes. Also refreshes codegraph if available.

hooks.prompt: SessionStart hook: Invoke the coder-orchestrator skill via the Skill tool NOW, before any other response or action. This establishes workflow routing for the entire session. After coder-orchestrator, also invoke codegraph-orchestrator if the user's request involves codebase exploration. Ensure graph is fresh: if .codegraph/graph.db is missing, run scan-codegraph.

hooks.command: echo 'Bug tracking reminder: ensure all discovered bugs are tracked as TaskCreate entries and fixed in the Bug Fix Phase.'

hooks.prompt: Stop hook: If this session involved coding work (TaskCreate calls, bug fixes, source code changes beyond config edits, or test/verification commands), then verify: (1) all tasks are marked completed via TaskUpdate, (2) all discovered High/Medium bugs are fixed, (3) verification commands passed (typecheck, lint, tests). Report any remaining Low bugs with file:line references. If the session only involved config edits or non-coding work, respond with a brief acknowledgment that no verification is needed and end.
